headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Faces A New Oil Reality As The Strait Of Hormuz Reopens
summary: U.S. and Iran have reached a peace agreement that reopens the Strait of Hormuz, restoring a critical global oil transit route. The agreement affects crude flows to key refining hubs, including the United States, with potential implications for refiner input costs and supply security. Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC), a major U.S. refiner, is directly exposed to changes in seaborne crude availability and shipping conditions through this corridor. Marathon Petroleum operates one of the largest...
